name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
LOU Top-grade Imported Cowhide Camera Bag, authentic Hong Kong purchase with custom mold. Very exquisite! Adjustable shoulder strap with stylish tassel pendant! 100% calfskin, grosgrain lining! Features an interior slip pocket! Very practical and elegant! 520534
Model: 57700
Size: 23x16x6cm
